title: Q2.6-R source authorization, isolation, and aggregation review
body: Merged Zero commit 3ee802c29ddf47982477a6b6dd635eaedede7bb7 adds a separate Q2.6-R authorization contract while retaining the Q2.6 transaction implementation. The driver rejects seeds 1 and 3 without that exact contract, routes each result to a seed-specific directory, refuses duplicates, and preserves the original seed-2 path. The checker pins diagnostic evidence and deep-validates every attempt through the unchanged Q2.6 checker. Aggregation waits for all three declared seeds and applies an all-go conjunction.
claims: Portable and Accelerate mechanics, recovery determinism, WASM, and results-integrity checks passed before the source contract merged.
Each ilXyr harness requires a clean exact source commit and refuses an existing result.
The family aggregator cannot run until both replication results exist and cannot select a replication model.
